purpose: Regression baseline for P&L refactors. Re-run the SQL in README.md after any change to revenue/cost/P&L logic and diff against these numbers. A number that moves is a red flag to investigate before merging.
revenue_definition: branch total_revenue = branch_revenue.amount (legacy) + register_closings (cash_sales + credit_sales + check_sales), matching calculateBranchPL.
waste_note: Waste (פחת) is end-of-day leftover product. It is deliberately NOT deducted from profit because that product was already counted in purchases (raw materials). Deducting it would double-count. It is kept only as a standalone KPI. The unit tests in src/lib/__tests__/plFormulas.test.ts enforce this.
caveats: MONTHS BEFORE 2026-05 ARE EXCLUDED: they were based on partial data (cashier-source migration overlap) and are not reliable. First reliable month = May 2026.
June 2026 fixed_costs are partially entered (105,960 vs ~195,260 in May).
July 2026 is a partial month (data through ~the 9th).
suppliers_ex_vat uses amount_without_vat when present, else amount.
branch_waste excludes one corrupt row (year 275760) automatically via month bucketing.
